bbd9.name: arrayLength
bbd9.summary: Gets the length of an array.
bbd9.description: Returns the number of elements in that array. The value is an unsigned, 32-bit integer  that is always numerically greater than the highest index in the array.

document.name: Show IOSXR Config
document.template:
Value HOSTNAME (\S+)
Value BANNER_MOTD (.+)
Value BANNER_LOGIN (.+)
Value DOMAIN_NAME (\S+)
Value DNS_SERVER (\S+)
Value IOS_VERSION (\S+)
Value INTERFACE (\S+)
Value IP_ADDRESS (\S+)
Value SHUTDOWN (shutdown)

Start
  ^.*IOS XR Configuration version = ${IOS_VERSION}
  ^hostname ${HOSTNAME}
  ^banner motd '${BANNER_MOTD}'
  ^banner login '${BANNER_LOGIN}'
  ^domain name ${DOMAIN_NAME}
  ^domain name-server ${DNS_SERVER}
  ^interface ${INTERFACE} -> InterfaceSection
  
InterfaceSection
  ^ ipv4 address dhcp -> Record
  ^ ipv4 address ${IP_ADDRESS} -> Record
  ^ ${SHUTDOWN}
  ^interface ${INTERFACE} -> Record
  ^! -> Record
document.data:
Thu Mar  5 22:36:12.217 UTC
Building configuration...
!! IOS XR Configuration version = 6.3.3
!! Last configuration change at Thu Mar  5 22:36:00 2026 by admin
!
!This is a test
!This is a test1
!This is a test2
hostname XRv9k-atl
banner motd 'EVEN NEWER banner TEXT ddd'
banner login 'Welcome to Itential'
service timestamps debug datetime localtime msec show-timezone
domain name support.itential.io
domain name-server 10.1.0.12
telnet vrf default ipv4 server max-servers 5
username root
 group root-lr
 group cisco-support
 secret 5 $1$cHX5$uzvJ3CC0ajOggT/2M9Isd0
!
username admin
 group root-lr
 group sysadmin
 secret 5 $1$lLX0$C0b/DOkrh84bd.AJGJ8n1/
!
aaa authorization exec default local
cdp
address-family ipv4 unicast
!
line console
 timeout login response 0
 exec-timeout 0 0
!
snmp-server host 10.1.0.156 traps version 2c dan1tom2
ntp
 server 50.205.244.20
 server 128.138.141.177
 server 216.229.0.50
!
call-home
 service active
 contact smart-licensing
 profile CiscoTAC-1
  active
  destination transport-method http
 !
!
!
class-map match-any voice-ip
 match precedence 0 
 end-class-map
! 
class-map match-any best-effort
 match precedence 4 
 end-class-map
! 
interface MgmtEth0/RP0/CPU0/0
 cdp
 ipv4 address dhcp
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0/0
 shutdown
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0/1
 shutdown
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0/2
 shutdown
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0/3
 shutdown
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0/4
 shutdown
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0/5
 shutdown
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0/6
 shutdown
!
router static
 address-family ipv4 unicast
  0.0.0.0/0 172.20.100.1
 !
!
ssh server enable cipher aes-cbc 3des-cbc
ssh server session-limit 10
ssh server v2
crypto fips-mode
end
